title: LR-115
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Blest be God the Father, and the Only Begotten Son of God, and also the Holy Spirit, for he has shown us his merciful love.

title: Revelation 1:8
author: Mass of the Desert - Tom Booth
snippet: Glory to the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit; to God who is, who was, and who is to come.

title: Freedom In Your Cross
author: Cooper Ray/Laura Ray/Tom Booth/Curtis Stephan/Steve Angrisano/Vocal arr. by Scott Soper
snippet: Deep inside this hardened heart, amid a stormy sea, lies a love that aches for you and longs to be set free, to be set free.

title: LR-116
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Since you are children of God, God has sent into your hearts the Spirit of his Son, the Spirit who cries out: Abba, Father.

title: Many and One
author: Steve Angrisano / Sarah Hart / Dwight Liles
snippet: We are many, yet we are one. We are sep'rate, yet bound in his love. And together we are all his hands and his feet, bringing mercy and peace to this world. We are many and one.

title: How Beautiful
author: Twila Paris
snippet: How Beautiful the hands that served the wine and the bread and the sons of the earth. How beautiful the feet that walked the long dusty roads and the hills to the cross.

title: Tell It Out
author: Timothy Smith
snippet: Tell it out, tell it out, let the word be spread. Jesus rose to save our souls, he's risen from the dead.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
